apihelp-query+featureusage-summary: Heshid koobitaanka isticmaalka astaamaha API ee loo diwangeliyey wakiilka isticmaalaha.
apihelp-query+featureusage-param-agent: Wakiilka isticmaalaha ee la weydiinayo. Haddii aan la cayimin, waxaa la weydiin doonaa wakiilka ku jira codsiga.
apihelp-query+featureusage-param-feature: Haddii la cayimo, soo culi faahfaahinta astaamahan oo keliya.
apihelp-query+featureusage-example-simpl: Weydiiso isticmaalka astaamaha ee wakiilka isticmaalaha hadda bisha u adeegsanayo
apierror-apifeatureusage-emptyagent: Lama weydiin karo wakiil isticmaale oo madhan.
